nasb.text: May God enlarge Japheth, And let him dwell in the tents of Shem; And let Canaan be his servant.”

esv.text: May God enlarge Japheth, and let him dwell in the tents of Shem, and let Canaan be his servant.”

cnv.text: 願　神使雅弗擴展， 使雅弗住在閃的帳棚裡； 願迦南作他的奴僕。”

ccb.text: 愿上帝扩张雅弗的疆界， 愿他住在闪的帐篷里， 让迦南做他的仆人。”

csbs.text: 愿神使雅弗扩张， 使他住在闪的帐篷中； 愿迦南作雅弗的奴仆。”
